com.pax.poslink.base

Class BaseResponse<T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.base.BaseResponse<T>
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    BatchResponse, DoSignatureResponse, GetFormListResponse, GetVarListResponse, ManageResponse, MultipleCommandsResponse, PayloadResponse, PaymentResponse, ReportResponse, RunFormResponse, SetVarListResponse, ShowDialogFormResponse, ShowDialogResponse, ShowItemResponse, ShowMessageResponse, ShowTextBoxResponse

    public abstract class BaseResponse<T>
extends java.lang.Object
    Base class for response data os POSLink

    • Field Detail

      • resultCode

        protected java.lang.String resultCode
        Result code of transaction. When code = 000000 means Approve. And other code means error. When code = 100002 means Aborted.

        Used to determine results of transaction.

      • resultTxt

        protected java.lang.String resultTxt
        Result Txt of transaction.

      • processTransResult

        protected ProcessTransResult processTransResult
